$comment: Immutable assembly of evidence items from source metadata, profiles, and requirements for SDD authoring.

solution_run_ref.description: Reference to the solution run that assembled this evidence

profile_snapshot_ref.description: Reference to the profile snapshot if profiling was performed

document_set_ref.description: Reference to the document set if documents were provided

requirement_set_ref.description: Reference to the requirement set if requirements were extracted

evidence_item_count.description: Number of evidence items in this set

assembly_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when evidence was assembled

fingerprint.description: SHA-256 hash of evidence set for verification
